goals: Explore existing marketing materials and guest information stored in the resort's digital memory
Understand how local search could help organize and retrieve marketing assets more efficiently
Calculate potential cost savings from switching to local search for marketing operations
Apply an appropriate workspace template for organizing resort marketing content
Verify the search system is properly configured and ready for marketing use

user_agent_config.personality: Business-minded and pragmatic, focused on ROI and operational efficiency. Prefers clear explanations over technical jargon. Curious about modern tools that could improve marketing effectiveness.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands hospitality marketing and guest experience well. Is familiar with basic digital tools but does not know technical details about search algorithms, embeddings, or local LLM setups. Has never heard of QMD or similar tools before.

end_condition: The resort owner has set up a local search system for their marketing materials, understands the cost savings, and has verified the system is working properly for their content needs.
